rows.label: tev056302_MSG0101
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Zazazan should be here by
now! Bodaboda not get one single
message since White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_MSG0102
rows.name: What if whole deal has gone south?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bodaboda how he knows Zazazan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_SEL0021
rows.name:
Assure Bodaboda that Zazazan is
safe and has left Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_MSG0103
rows.name:
Zazazan is important to Bodaboda.
Everything else is not business of friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_MSG0104
rows.name:
Friend knows Zazazan? Hurray! Zazazan
is very important to Bodaboda.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056302_MSG0105
rows.name:
But Zazazan really needs to
get butt in gear and stop
testing patience of Bodaboda.[ST:wait ]
